column2: Verify that an admin can update a bracket name from the Config page
column3:
1. Login to admin.fctf.site as an admin.
2. Open the Config page and navigate to Scoreboard Brackets.
3. Select an existing bracket.
4. Update the bracket name.
5. Save the change.
6. Open a team edit form and review the bracket dropdown.
column4:
- The bracket update succeeds.
- The updated bracket name appears in the Config page.
- The new name is reflected in the team edit dropdown.
- The bracket remains usable after the update.
column5:
- Admin is logged in to admin.fctf.site.
- At least 1 editable bracket exists.
- The admin can access the Config page and a team edit form.
